name: The French Defense
description: Line trainer for the French Defense, generated from the canonical opening database (lichess-org/chess-openings): 61 positions drilled book-move by book-move from Black's side across 212 named variations. Each card shows the position from Black's side and asks for the book move; the back gives the line so far, the variation name and ECO code, and the covered replies that continue it.

fields.prompt: You are Black in the main line. What is the book move?
fields.extra: Line: 1. e4 **e6**. This is the main line (C00). Covered replies: 2. d4 (Normal Variation), 2. Nf3 (Knight Variation), 2. d3 (King's Indian Attack), 2. Nc3 (Queen's Knight), 2. b4 (Banzai-Leong Gambit), 2. b3 (Horwitz Attack), 2. f4 (La Bourdonnais Variation), 2. c4 (Steiner Variation), 2. Bb5 (Bird Invitation), 2. Qe2 (Chigorin Variation), 2. g3 (Réti-Spielmann Attack), 2. e5 (Steinitz Attack).
